name: Continue Screen CTA
description: Final campaign conversion section styled like a retro continue screen with countdown, pledge action, referral prompt, and confidence cues.

continue-screen.description: Full-width final CTA with continue prompt, campaign countdown, pledge/reserve action, and share option.

slots.continue-prompt: Large direct headline such as Continue the build, Back the first run, or Unlock beta access.
slots.countdown: Campaign timer or limited window note.
slots.confidence-cues: Short row of guarantee, prototype, shipping, or beta status cues.
slots.action-row: Primary pledge/reserve/join action and secondary share/demo action.

share-after-action.description: Post-conversion continue screen prompting supporters to share, invite, or unlock referral rewards.

slots.share-actions: Copy link, share, email, or social actions.

visual_brief: A decisive final CTA that feels like an arcade Continue screen. Use giant readable copy, one primary action, a supporting share/demo action, and confidence cues. Avoid generic centered CTA banners, gradient blobs, or vague marketing copy. The section should close the campaign loop.

responsive.mobile: Single-column with full-width buttons and compact confidence cue stack.
responsive.tablet: Centered layout with wrapped action row.
responsive.desktop: Large centered continue prompt with countdown and action row visible without scrolling within the section.

layout_hints.primary_action: Only one primary action should dominate.
layout_hints.copy: Use direct launch language: Back the first run, Reserve your kit, Join beta, or Share to unlock.

micro.countdown-tick: LED digit update without layout shift

transitions.enter: Continue prompt snaps in with short stagger for cues and actions.

keyboard: Primary action should be first in the action row focus order.
